title: smilax lanceifolia subsp. reflexa
intro: Smilax lanceifolia subsp. reflexa, commonly known as the climbing panax or Chinese ginseng, is a species of flowering plant in the Smilacaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Smilax lanceifolia subsp. reflexa include improving immune function, reducing stress and anxiety, and promoting overall well-being. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea, or in capsule form, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
